But the piece is incomplete and cuts off mid-sentence, so the flow breaks and it never fully explains the tax-rate side or why bills change year to year."}

rationale: Clear, plain-English opening with a useful formula and concrete examples. The tone is approachable and the wording is simple. But the piece is incomplete and cuts off mid-sentence, so the flow breaks and it never fully explains the tax-rate side or why bills change year to year.
